text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I heard a student call out to me, and the<n>minute I
turned around, she shoved<n>these chocolates in my
hands...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Then she ran off. I didn't even have time<n>to think.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...Her form was pretty good though.<n>What class is
she in?
